items.title: Rescuers to use air cushions in latest effort to save stranded whale
items.dek: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.
items.body: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.

items.title: Naples bank robbers hold 25 people hostage then vanish through tunnel
items.dek: The armed men reportedly evaded capture by escaping through the city's sewer system.
items.body: The armed men reportedly evaded capture by escaping through the city's sewer system.

items.title: How did a wolf become a fugitive in South Korea?
items.dek: A wolf burrowed under a fence at his zoo in South Korea becoming the country's newest fugitive.
items.body: A wolf burrowed under a fence at his zoo in South Korea becoming the country's newest fugitive.
